home.subtitle: The definitive knowledge platform for Open Source AI — visual-first, accessibility-led, curated by humans and automated by robots.
home.categoriesDescription: Jump into the corner of the universe that matches your goal.
home.featuredDescription: Hand-picked projects worth your attention this week.
home.modelsDescription: From small LLMs to image generators — all open weights.
home.newsDescription: Updates from the Open Source AI universe.
home.learningDescription: Curated sequences to take you from curious to confident.
home.graphDescription: Every project, model, concept, and tutorial is connected. (Coming in Phase 1 Milestone 3.)
home.graphBody: Interactive graph explorer lets you traverse connections between projects, models, and concepts in any direction.
